articles.summary: Just how good are Mercedes in China?. F1.com's Lawrence Barretto delves into the data from Sprint Qualifying after George Russell sealed an impressive pole.

articles.title: 'Confident' Gasly reflects on China Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: 'Confident' Gasly reflects on China Sprint Qualifying. Pierre Gasly has reflected on an impressive Sprint Qualifying performance at the Chinese Grand Prix, with the Alpine driver set to start Saturday's Sprint from seventh on the grid.

articles.title: Bearman admits surprise after strong China Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: Bearman admits surprise after strong China Sprint Qualifying. Ollie Bearman admits he 'was not expecting to be in the fight' for points in Saturday's Sprint after an impressive Sprint Qualifying at the Chinese Grand Prix, with the Haas driver set to start from ninth.

articles.summary: What the teams said – Sprint Qualifying in China. The drivers and teams report back on Sprint Qualifying from the Shanghai International Circuit for the F1 Sprint 2026 Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Verstappen rues ‘disaster’ day of China Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: Verstappen rues ‘disaster’ day of China Sprint Qualifying. Max Verstappen labelled Friday at the Chinese Grand Prix as a “disaster pace-wise”, with the Red Bull driver suggesting that he does not yet know what the team will do to address the issues for the rest of the weekend after ending Sprint Qua...

articles.title: Norris targets 'opportunity' in China Sprint to beat Russell
articles.summary: Norris targets 'opportunity' in China Sprint to beat Russell. Lando Norris believes the start of Saturday's Sprint at the Chinese Grand Prix is 'an opportunity for sure' to try and beat the Mercedes of George Russell and Kimi Antonelli.

articles.title: Mixed emotions for Ferrari drivers in China Sprint Qualifying
articles.summary: Mixed emotions for Ferrari drivers in China Sprint Qualifying. Lewis Hamilton and Charles Leclerc were left with differing views after Sprint Qualifying at the Shanghai International Circuit – the former feeling “really pleased” and the latter left to rue issues on his final timed lap.

articles.title: Russell reveals timing line quirk led to start issues, with a proposed fix being opposed by Ferrari
articles.summary: Russell reveals timing line quirk led to start issues, with a proposed fix being opposed by Ferrari. George Russell says a change that would impact starts for teams at the Chinese Grand Prix is being opposed by a rival team after a number of cars did not have full batteries on the grid in Melbourne.

articles.title: Hamilton calls for Ferrari push to close PU deficit to Mercedes
articles.summary: Hamilton calls for Ferrari push to close PU deficit to Mercedes. Lewis Hamilton says Ferrari has the car to compete with Mercedes but needs to find more performance from its power unit to get on level terms.

articles.title: Verstappen laments ‘disaster’ day for Red Bull in Sprint qualifying
articles.summary: Verstappen laments ‘disaster’ day for Red Bull in Sprint qualifying. Max Verstappen says Red Bull’s Friday at the Chinese Grand Prix was “a disaster pace-wise” as both drivers struggled for grip and barely made the top 10 in qualifying for the Sprint.

articles.title: Technical updates: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix
articles.summary: Technical updates: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix. Ferrari is the only one of the top four teams to bring a new component to the Chinese Grand Prix, while Formula 1 newcomer Cadillac has also introduced upgrades.

articles.summary: Russell leads Mercedes Shanghai Sprint front-row lockout. George Russell led a comfortable Mercedes front-row lockout for the Sprint at the Chinese Grand Prix in Shanghai.

articles.summary: Mercedes dominates sole Chinese GP practice. George Russell and Mercedes teammate Kimi Antonelli established a comfortable margin over the field in the sole practice session for the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.title: Lapping Shanghai with Zhou Guanyu
articles.summary: Lapping Shanghai with Zhou Guanyu. Zhou Guanyu became the first Chinese F1 driver to compete in his home event, so who better than the Cadillac reserve driver to talk us around a lap of the Shanghai International Circuit?

articles.title: Norris doesn’t see an unfair advantage in Mercedes PU
articles.summary: Norris doesn’t see an unfair advantage in Mercedes PU. Lando Norris says McLaren is confident that Mercedes is not breaking any rules by retaining more knowledge about how to operate its power unit at the start of the 2026 season.

articles.title: Ferrari’s innovative rear wing set to debut in Chinese GP
articles.summary: Ferrari’s innovative rear wing set to debut in Chinese GP. Ferrari is set to run its rear wing design featuring an upper element that rotates through 180 degrees during this weekend’s Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Bahrain & Saudi Arabia Grands Prix to be cancelled. The Bahrain and Saudi Arabia Grands Prix scheduled for next month are set to be cancelled as a result of the Middle East war.

articles.summary: Russell takes dominant Chinese GP sprint pole. George Russell leads team-mate Kimi Antonelli as Mercedes dominate qualifying for the sprint race at the Chinese Grand Prix.

articles.summary: Russell accuses Ferrari of selfishness over rules. Mercedes driver George Russell accuses Ferrari of being "selfish" for blocking a change to the rules to improve safety at race starts.

articles.title: Verstappen wishes F1 was 'more fun' but hopeful of change
articles.summary: Verstappen wishes F1 was 'more fun' but hopeful of change. Max Verstappen says he wishes F1 was "more fun" but is hopeful the sport is heading towards changes that will "improve everything".

articles.summary: More than the Score. Max Verstappen's set to compete in his first endurance race - is he getting bored of F1?
